news.title: Iran strikes halt Qatar LNG output, shaking global energy markets
news.summary: QatarEnergy said the attack hit its facilities at Ras Laffan Industrial City and Mesaieed Industrial City. QatarEnergy: The attack hit our facilities at the two industrial cities.

news.title: Steve Eisman says investors should ignore U.S.-Iran war, will be long-term 'positive'
news.summary: 'The Big Short' investor says he wouldn't change a single trade because of the conflict. He also said he would not change anything about his investment strategy.

news.title: Nvidia to invest $4 billion in two photonics companies
news.summary: Coherent and Lumentum will both receive $2 billion each from the chip giant as part of the strategic investment. Coherent will get $1 billion each, while Lumentsum will receive $1.5 billion each.

news.title: Travel stocks sink after thousands of flights grounded following Iran strikes
news.summary: Airlines and hotel stocks fell after the U.S.-Israeli attacks on Iran and subsequent retaliation strikes. Airlines and some hotel stocks fall after the United States and Israel attack on Iran.

news.title: Global markets after Iran strikes: Oil surges, airlines sink, bonds defy safe-haven playbook
news.summary: Global markets open lower across the board. Major sectors in Europe and Asia negative. FTSE 100 down 0.4%, DAX down 0% and CAC down 1%.

news.title: My brother is paranoid, alone and has forgotten that he sold his house. How can we help?
news.summary: His lawyer said, “He’s gone off the deep end.” His lawyer said he was “going off thedeep end’

news.title: Here’s how far oil is away from dragging stocks into a bear market, according to Morgan Stanley
news.summary: History shows market can recover quite quickly from geopolitical shocks, as seen in recent days. In this case, the U.S. is facing a threat from North Korea, which has threatened to invade the South.

news.title: Anthropic’s Claude suffers an outage. Here’s what to know.
news.summary: Claude had been gaining more respect with users following ChatGPT backlash and the introduction of new coding tools. An outage might erode some of that goodwill.

news.title: Here’s what’s worth streaming in March 2026 on Netflix, Hulu, HBO Max and more
news.summary: HBO’s ‘DTF St. Louis’ and ‘Rooster’ jump out of the gate as Emmy season gets underway. ‘Peaky Blinders’ movie is set to be released on Netflix.

news.title: ‘I don’t earn enough to support us and our baby’: My husband is unemployed and lost $22,000 trading sports cards. What now?
news.summary: “I intervened, shut the business down and got him into therapy and support for gambling-type behaviors,” she says. “I shut down his business and got his behavior under control.”
